goal: Build a 4-station serial assembly-line: four Franka arms (Station A/B/C/D) arranged along a common table at y=0 and x=-1.5, -0.5, +0.5, +1.5. A subassembly (cube, 0.06m) starts at StationA, gets picked and passed to StationB handoff tray, then StationC, then StationD final bin. setup_robot_claim_mutex prevents simultaneous grasp of the shared handoff trays. setup_robot_handoff_signal coordinates downstream robot activation after upstream robot releases. Exercises multi-robot serial handoff, claim-mutex sequencing, and inter-robot signal protocol.
thoughts:
Design rationale for 4-robot serial handoff production cell:

1) Layout: four Franka arms on a 0.75m table at fixed y=0, evenly spaced 1.0m apart: StationA at x=-1.5, StationB at x=-0.5, StationC at x=+0.5, StationD at x=+1.5. Facing direction: each robot faces +y (orientation = [0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068]) so its gripper sweeps the y>0 region where handoff trays and the input station sit.

2) Handoff trays at y=0.55 (0.55m in front of each robot base). Tray dimensions 0.20x0.20x0.04m. Tray for A→B handoff sits between StationA and StationB workspaces: x=-1.0, y=0.55. Similarly B→C tray at x=0.0, C→D tray at x=+1.0. Final bin at x=+1.5, y=0.55, z=0.78.

3) Reach check: Franka reach ~0.85m. Robot at x=-1.5 picks from tray at x=-1.5, y=0.55 (distance=0.55m, OK) and places to A→B tray at x=-1.0, y=0.55 (distance = sqrt(0.5^2+0.55^2)=0.74m, within reach). StationB picks from x=-1.0 (distance=0.5m) and places to x=0.0 (distance=sqrt(0.5^2+0.55^2)=0.74m). Same geometry for C and D.

4) Claim mutex: setup_robot_claim_mutex(mutex_path='/World/MutexAB', robots=['/World/FrankaA', '/World/FrankaB'], tray_path='/World/TrayAB') ensures only one robot holds the A→B tray at a time. Equivalent mutexes for BC and CD trays.

5) Handoff signal: setup_robot_handoff_signal(upstream='/World/FrankaA', downstream='/World/FrankaB', signal_path='/World/SignalAB') triggers FrankaB pick as soon as FrankaA releases onto TrayAB. Chain: A→B→C→D.

6) Physics: CPU dynamics. Subassembly cube 0.06m, mass 0.3kg, rubber material for stable grip.

7) Sequence summary: FrankaA picks WorkpieceA from InfeedStation (x=-1.5, y=0.55, z=0.825), places to TrayAB. FrankaB picks from TrayAB, places to TrayBC. FrankaC picks from TrayBC, places to TrayCD. FrankaD picks from TrayCD, delivers to FinalBin.

8) Function-gate: simulate_args cube_path=WorkpieceA, target_path=FinalBin. Success = WorkpieceA inside FinalBin after duration_s.
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics: CPU dynamics for determinism ─────────────────────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Shared robot table (long bench, all 4 robots mounted on it) ───────────────
# Table: 4m long, 0.5m wide, 0.75m tall. scale is half-extents for USD Cube (2m unit).
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Table",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0, 0, 0.375],
    scale=[2.0, 0.25, 0.375],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── 4 Franka robots — spaced 1.0m apart along X axis ─────────────────────────
station_xs = {"A": -1.5, "B": -0.5, "C": 0.5, "D": 1.5}
for label, x in station_xs.items():
    robot_wizard(
        robot_name="franka_panda",
        dest_path=f"/World/Franka{label}",
        position=[x, 0, 0.75],
        orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
    )

# ── Infeed station for StationA ────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Raised platform tray where the initial workpiece rests.
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/InfeedStation",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[-1.5, 0.55, 0.785],
    scale=[0.12, 0.12, 0.035],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/InfeedStation", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── 3 inter-station handoff trays (A→B, B→C, C→D) ────────────────────────────
# Tray geometry: 0.20×0.20×0.04m platform (scale=[0.10, 0.10, 0.02]).
# Tray z-top = 0.78 + 0.02 = 0.80; workpiece centre z = 0.80 + 0.03 = 0.83.
tray_positions = {
    "AB": [-1.0, 0.55, 0.78],
    "BC": [ 0.0, 0.55, 0.78],
    "CD": [ 1.0, 0.55, 0.78],
}
for name, pos in tray_positions.items():
    create_prim(
        prim_path=f"/World/Tray{name}",
        prim_type="Cube",
        position=pos,
        scale=[0.10, 0.10, 0.02],
    )
    apply_api_schema(prim_path=f"/World/Tray{name}", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Final delivery bin (StationD output) ──────────────────────────────────────
create_bin(
    prim_path="/World/FinalBin",
    position=[1.5, 0.55, 0.78],
    size=[0.25, 0.25, 0.12],
)

# ── Subassembly workpiece ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 0.06m cube, mass 0.3 kg, starts at InfeedStation (x=-1.5, y=0.55, z=0.85).
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/WorkpieceA",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[-1.5, 0.55, 0.85],
    size=0.06,
)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/WorkpieceA", schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/WorkpieceA"],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/WorkpieceA", material_name="rubber")

# ── Robot claim mutexes — prevent simultaneous grasp of shared trays ──────────
# Each mutex serialises access between the upstream and downstream robot.
setup_robot_claim_mutex(
    mutex_path="/World/MutexAB",
    robots=["/World/FrankaA", "/World/FrankaB"],
    tray_path="/World/TrayAB",
)
setup_robot_claim_mutex(
    mutex_path="/World/MutexBC",
    robots=["/World/FrankaB", "/World/FrankaC"],
    tray_path="/World/TrayBC",
)
setup_robot_claim_mutex(
    mutex_path="/World/MutexCD",
    robots=["/World/FrankaC", "/World/FrankaD"],
    tray_path="/World/TrayCD",
)

# ── Handoff signals — downstream robot activates after upstream releases ───────
# Signal fires when upstream pick_place_controller confirms place_complete.
setup_robot_handoff_signal(
    upstream_robot="/World/FrankaA",
    downstream_robot="/World/FrankaB",
    signal_path="/World/SignalAB",
    trigger_on="place_complete",
)
setup_robot_handoff_signal(
    upstream_robot="/World/FrankaB",
    downstream_robot="/World/FrankaC",
    signal_path="/World/SignalBC",
    trigger_on="place_complete",
)
setup_robot_handoff_signal(
    upstream_robot="/World/FrankaC",
    downstream_robot="/World/FrankaD",
    signal_path="/World/SignalCD",
    trigger_on="place_complete",
)

# ── Per-station pick-place controllers ────────────────────────────────────────
# StationA: picks from InfeedStation, places to TrayAB.
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/FrankaA",
    target_source="curobo",
    source_paths=["/World/WorkpieceA"],
    destination_path="/World/TrayAB",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/TrayAB", "/World/InfeedStation"],
    handoff_signal="/World/SignalAB",
    claim_mutex="/World/MutexAB",
)

# StationB: picks from TrayAB, places to TrayBC.
# Activation gated on SignalAB firing (FrankaA placed successfully).
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/FrankaB",
    target_source="curobo",
    source_paths=["/World/TrayAB"],
    destination_path="/World/TrayBC",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/TrayAB", "/World/TrayBC"],
    activation_signal="/World/SignalAB",
    handoff_signal="/World/SignalBC",
    claim_mutex="/World/MutexBC",
)

# StationC: picks from TrayBC, places to TrayCD.
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/FrankaC",
    target_source="curobo",
    source_paths=["/World/TrayBC"],
    destination_path="/World/TrayCD",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/TrayBC", "/World/TrayCD"],
    activation_signal="/World/SignalBC",
    handoff_signal="/World/SignalCD",
    claim_mutex="/World/MutexCD",
)

# StationD: picks from TrayCD, delivers to FinalBin.
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/FrankaD",
    target_source="curobo",
    source_paths=["/World/TrayCD"],
    destination_path="/World/FinalBin",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/TrayCD", "/World/FinalBin"],
    activation_signal="/World/SignalCD",
)
failure_modes: FrankaB/C/D may attempt pick before upstream robot finishes place — handoff signal must fire before downstream activation; if setup_robot_handoff_signal is not respected by the handler, add a sim-step settle delay between stage transitions.

Claim mutex deadlock: if FrankaA holds MutexAB and FrankaB also tries to acquire MutexAB simultaneously, the handler must implement try_acquire (non-blocking) with back-off; missing back-off will freeze the scene.
Franka reach to TrayAB from FrankaA: horizontal distance = sqrt(0.5^2+0.55^2) = 0.74m vs Franka max reach ~0.85m — tight margin; if IK fails, move tray closer to x=-1.2 (reduces distance to 0.67m).
WorkpieceA sliding off narrow tray (0.20×0.20m): rubber physics material reduces sliding but if placement precision exceeds 0.05m error, increase tray to scale=[0.15, 0.15, 0.02] (0.30×0.30m).

Serial pipeline latency: with 4 sequential hand-offs and duration_s=300, each stage has ~75s budget; cuRobo planning latency per move ~3-5s means up to ~20 moves total OK but leave no margin if the first planning call fails and retries.

Long robot table (4m) may cause PhysX collision-mesh tunneling at corners — verify Table's collision mesh covers all 4 robot bases; if a robot falls, add individual base-plates under each robot_wizard dest_path.
code_template:
# ── Scene skeleton ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[2.0, 0.25, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(robot_name={{station_a_robot.class}}, dest_path={{station_a_robot.path}}, position={{station_a_robot.position}}, orientation={{station_a_robot.orientation}})
robot_wizard(robot_name={{station_b_robot.class}}, dest_path={{station_b_robot.path}}, position={{station_b_robot.position}}, orientation={{station_b_robot.orientation}})
robot_wizard(robot_name={{station_c_robot.class}}, dest_path={{station_c_robot.path}}, position={{station_c_robot.position}}, orientation={{station_c_robot.orientation}})
robot_wizard(robot_name={{station_d_robot.class}}, dest_path={{station_d_robot.path}}, position={{station_d_robot.position}}, orientation={{station_d_robot.orientation}})

for tray in [{{handoff_trays[0]}}, {{handoff_trays[1]}}, {{handoff_trays[2]}}]:
    create_prim(prim_path=tray['path'], prim_type='Cube', position=tray['position'], scale=tray['scale'])
    apply_api_schema(prim_path=tray['path'], schema_name='PhysicsCollisionAPI')

create_bin(prim_path={{final_destination.path}}, position={{final_destination.position}}, size={{final_destination.size}})

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type='Cube', position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size={{workpieces[0].size}})
for api in ('PhysicsRigidBodyAPI', 'PhysicsCollisionAPI', 'PhysicsMassAPI', 'PhysxRigidBodyAPI'):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}], attr='physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold', value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, material_name='rubber')

setup_robot_claim_mutex(mutex_path='/World/MutexAB', robots=[{{station_a_robot.path}}, {{station_b_robot.path}}], tray_path={{handoff_trays[0].path}})
setup_robot_claim_mutex(mutex_path='/World/MutexBC', robots=[{{station_b_robot.path}}, {{station_c_robot.path}}], tray_path={{handoff_trays[1].path}})
setup_robot_claim_mutex(mutex_path='/World/MutexCD', robots=[{{station_c_robot.path}}, {{station_d_robot.path}}], tray_path={{handoff_trays[2].path}})

setup_robot_handoff_signal(upstream_robot={{station_a_robot.path}}, downstream_robot={{station_b_robot.path}}, signal_path='/World/SignalAB', trigger_on='place_complete')
setup_robot_handoff_signal(upstream_robot={{station_b_robot.path}}, downstream_robot={{station_c_robot.path}}, signal_path='/World/SignalBC', trigger_on='place_complete')
setup_robot_handoff_signal(upstream_robot={{station_c_robot.path}}, downstream_robot={{station_d_robot.path}}, signal_path='/World/SignalCD', trigger_on='place_complete')

setup_pick_place_controller(robot_path={{station_a_robot.path}}, target_source='curobo', source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}], destination_path={{handoff_trays[0].path}}, planning_obstacles=['/World/Table', {{handoff_trays[0].path}}], handoff_signal='/World/SignalAB', claim_mutex='/World/MutexAB')
setup_pick_place_controller(robot_path={{station_b_robot.path}}, target_source='curobo', source_paths=[{{handoff_trays[0].path}}], destination_path={{handoff_trays[1].path}}, planning_obstacles=['/World/Table', {{handoff_trays[0].path}}, {{handoff_trays[1].path}}], activation_signal='/World/SignalAB', handoff_signal='/World/SignalBC', claim_mutex='/World/MutexBC')
setup_pick_place_controller(robot_path={{station_c_robot.path}}, target_source='curobo', source_paths=[{{handoff_trays[1].path}}], destination_path={{handoff_trays[2].path}}, planning_obstacles=['/World/Table', {{handoff_trays[1].path}}, {{handoff_trays[2].path}}], activation_signal='/World/SignalBC', handoff_signal='/World/SignalCD', claim_mutex='/World/MutexCD')
setup_pick_place_controller(robot_path={{station_d_robot.path}}, target_source='curobo', source_paths=[{{handoff_trays[2].path}}], destination_path={{final_destination.path}}, planning_obstacles=['/World/Table', {{handoff_trays[2].path}}, {{final_destination.path}}], activation_signal='/World/SignalCD')
